commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a per-CLI-backend opt-in flag to reseed fresh CLI sessions from the raw transcript tail when no usable compaction summary exists, plus tests for that opt-in path.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blocker: source inspection shows the proposed config key is absent from the strict `CliBackendSchema` and generated schema. Reproducing would be `openclaw config validate` with the PR's example config; I did not run validation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer should decide whether to accept the raw-transcript opt-in before any automated repair fills in the schema/docs/changelog gaps.

target.title: feat(cli-runner): opt-in flag to reseed from raw transcript when no compaction exists
target.author: eduardm23
